unitDesc: Half-Elf Bard (College of Lore). Battlefield controller and support specialist focused on debuffs, inspiration, and reaction disruption.

standardActions.name: Vicious Mockery
standardActions.desc: Target within 60 ft must succeed on DC 13 WIS save or take 4 (1d4 + 2) psychic damage and have disadvantage on its next attack.

standardActions.name: Fire Bolt
standardActions.desc: Ranged Spell Attack +5 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. 5 (1d10) fire damage.

standardActions.name: Shocking Grasp
standardActions.desc: Melee Spell Attack +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. 4 (1d8) lightning damage. Target cannot take reactions until start of its next turn.

standardActions.name: Shard-Siphon Knives
standardActions.desc: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack +3 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. 6 (1d4 + 1 + 1d6 piercing + 1d6 force) damage.

bonusActions.name: Bardic Inspiration (3/Long Rest)
bonusActions.desc: Grant a creature within 60 ft a 1d6 inspiration die. They can add it to a failed roll within 1 hour.

reactions.name: Cutting Words
reactions.desc: When a creature within 60 ft succeeds on an attack, ability check, or damage roll, expend Bardic Inspiration and subtract 1d6 from the roll.

specialAbilities.name: Spellcasting
specialAbilities.desc: Bard spellcaster (CHA). Spell Save DC 13, Spell Attack +5.

specialAbilities.name: Jack of All Trades
specialAbilities.desc: Add +1 to ability checks not already proficient.

specialAbilities.name: Fey Ancestry
specialAbilities.desc: Advantage vs charm; immune to magical sleep.

spellActions.name: Utility
spellActions.desc: Speak with Animals, Magic Missile (1/Long Rest)

skills: Deception +5, Insight +5, Intimidation +5, Perception +7, Performance +7, Persuasion +5
